docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-13-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST LARION KRAYZMAN, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: APR-13-2011, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-28-2011. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-13-2011 CONTINUED TO JUN-15-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUN-15-2011 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KRAYZMAN, LARION DBA KRAYZMAN AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, YULEE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-22-2011

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-15-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance, nor objection filed. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-13-2011 Continued To Jun-15-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff is sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 6/15/2011 at 1:30 PM, in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)
